[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10001000 2
1 01101111 6
2 11011101 6
3 10101011 5
4 10111000 4
5 10111010 5
6 10100011 4
7 10001000 2

01 01000000 1
12 00000000 a
23 00011000 2
34 00100011 3
45 10000000 1
56 00100010 2
67 00001100 2
70 10100011 4 match 6

13 00011000 2
24 00110010 3
35 10000000 1
46 00000000 a
57 00001100 2
60 10000101 3
71 01000011 3

37 00000000 a

73 01010000 2
